findings.title: Missing database indexes on foreign keys
findings.issue: Product.categoryId and ProductImage.productId lack @@index directives. Category filtering does full table scans.
findings.suggestion: Add @@index([categoryId]) to Product and @@index([productId]) to ProductImage.
findings.impact: Query performance degrades linearly with product count.

findings.title: No error handling in Next.js server component pages
findings.issue: Promise.all with no try-catch. API downtime causes unhandled error and broken page.
findings.suggestion: Add error.tsx boundary or try-catch with fallback UI.
findings.impact: Users see broken page when API is temporarily unavailable.

findings.title: StockBadge shows Low Stock for negative stockQuantity
findings.issue: stockQuantity === 0 check misses negative values. -1 shows Low Stock instead of Out of Stock.
findings.impact: Products with negative stock (data error) misleadingly shown as available.

findings.title: parseInt on query params can produce NaN — MITIGATED
findings.issue: Originally parseInt could produce NaN. Now mitigated with Number.isFinite() guard.
findings.suggestion: No further action needed — guard is in place.
findings.impact: Mitigated. NaN values now fall back to defaults.

fixedSinceLastRun.title: Type-unsafe null return in getProduct API client
fixedSinceLastRun.fix: Changed return type to Promise<Product | null>, return null directly

fixedSinceLastRun.title: No pagination bounds validation — DoS vector
fixedSinceLastRun.fix: Clamped page >= 1, pageSize 1-100. Added Number.isFinite() guard in controller.
